title: NVIDIA Shares Surge on AI Chip Demand
content: NVIDIA shares rose 5% today as demand for AI infrastructure continues to outpace supply. Analysts suggest that the Blackwell architecture is seeing record pre-orders from major cloud providers.

title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 Preliminary Benchmarks
content: OpenAI has shared early benchmarks for its next-generation model. The results show significant improvements in complex reasoning and multi-modal understanding, outperforming existing models by 30%.

title: Federal Reserve Holds Interest Rates Steady
content: The Federal Reserve decided to keep interest rates unchanged at its latest meeting, citing a cooling but still resilient economy. Chairman Jerome Powell indicated that rate cuts might be considered later this year.

title: Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High Over $100k
content: Bitcoin has officially crossed the $100,000 threshold for the first time in history. The surge is attributed to increased institutional adoption and the approval of new crypto-based ETFs.

title: Global Climate Summit Reaches Landmark Agreement
content: Over 190 countries have signed a new treaty to accelerate the transition to renewable energy. The agreement includes specific targets for reducing methane emissions by 2030.

title: New Mars Rover Successfully Lands at Jezero Crater
content: NASA's latest mission to the red planet has successfully touched down. The rover will begin searching for signs of ancient life and collecting rock samples for return to Earth.

title: NVIDIA Stocks Jump After Earnings Report
content: NVIDIA stock saw a massive gain today following an earnings report that beat expectations. The company's focus on AI chips is paying off as big tech companies invest heavily.
